deployedGeneratedSources.name: #utility.yul

documentation.text:
OrderRecord Contract
 Records cryptographic hashes of orders for immutable audit trail
 Each order is recorded once with its hash for verification and tracking
 
 Use case: E-commerce platform (ChocoJell)
 - Record order_id hash when order is created
 - Immutable proof that order existed at specific time
 - Verify order integrity later if needed
 
 Hash Format: keccak256(abi.encodePacked(orderId, customerId, totalPrice, orderDate))
 This ensures order cannot be modified after recording

Get total recorded orders count
 @return Total count of orders recorded

returns._0: Timestamp in seconds (0 if not recorded)

params._orderHash: Pre-calculated Keccak256 hash of order data  Requirements: - Order ID must be > 0 - Order hash must not be empty (bytes32(0)) - Order must not already be recorded
params._totalPrice: Total price in smallest unit (IDR cents or equivalent)

returns.isValid: True if hash matches and order is recorded

recordOrder(uint256,uint256,uint256,byte.notice: Record a new order hash to blockchain Only records once per order ID (prevents duplicate recording)

verifyOrderHash(uint256,bytes32).notice: Verify order hash matches recorded hash Useful for proving order integrity

userdoc.notice: OrderRecord Contract Records cryptographic hashes of orders for immutable audit trail Each order is recorded once with its hash for verification and tracking  Use case: E-commerce platform (ChocoJell) - Record order_id hash when order is created - Immutable proof that order existed at specific time - Verify order integrity later if needed  Hash Format: keccak256(abi.encodePacked(orderId, customerId, totalPrice, orderDate)) This ensures order cannot be modified after recording
